title: Bloom
description: A vibrant shaderpack upgrading the feel of vanilla, while keeping performance.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aba80f706a61990e8c9fd924b76ca4fb195649e6.png)
![Beta Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f4006bd685cb07916148cd9e764b4b94618cac5_0.webp)
![Devider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a4579a371f1ca7e2871d22a60d53dc3c364801c.png)
![Features Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c93d1a056d4309425d92116aa3fa7662143667fb_0.webp)
Bloom is a lightweight, vibrant shader.
It keeps the vanilla feel, but makes the world brighter, warmer, and more beautiful.

Made to look good while still running well on low-end and potato PCs.

![Devider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a4579a371f1ca7e2871d22a60d53dc3c364801c.png)
![Performance Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24c1027515d7e5483ed6c4b61041aa3edb0f41a8_0.webp)
Bloom is made for smooth gameplay and lower-end systems.
It avoids heavy effects, extreme reflections, and expensive rendering tricks, making it a good choice for potatoes.

![Devider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a4579a371f1ca7e2871d22a60d53dc3c364801c.png)
![Reccomend For Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b181768757ba0a52f17581636a0bd02c650843f8_0.webp)
Survival gameplay
Low-end laptops
Vanilla-style worlds
Players who want shaders without huge FPS loss

![Devider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a4579a371f1ca7e2871d22a60d53dc3c364801c.png)
